mapper.sql: select paper_id, parent_paper_id, paper_name, course_id, paper_type, paper_level, answer_mode, paper_weight, sort_no, total_score, duration_minutes, publish_status, publish_start_time, publish_end_time, strategy_template_id, pass_score, marking_mode, question_order_mode, question_navigation_mode, allow_review_analysis, anti_cheat_enabled, max_focus_loss_count, auto_submit_on_focus_loss_limit, allow_copy_paste, max_attempt_count, allow_view_score, section_config_json, adaptive_rule_json, status from sc_exam_paper
mapper.insert: insert into sc_exam_paper(parent_paper_id, paper_name, course_id, paper_type, paper_level, answer_mode, paper_weight, sort_no, total_score, duration_minutes, publish_status, publish_start_time, publish_end_time, strategy_template_id, pass_score, marking_mode, question_order_mode, question_navigation_mode, allow_review_analysis, anti_cheat_enabled, max_focus_loss_count, auto_submit_on_focus_loss_limit, allow_copy_paste, max_attempt_count, allow_view_score, section_config_json, adaptive_rule_json, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{parentPaperId}, #{paperName}, #{courseId}, #{paperType}, #{paperLevel}, #{answerMode}, #{paperWeight}, #{sortNo}, #{totalScore}, #{durationMinutes}, #{publishStatus}, #{publishStartTime}, #{publishEndTime}, #{strategyTemplateId}, #{passScore}, #{markingMode}, #{questionOrderMode}, #{questionNavigationMode}, #{allowReviewAnalysis}, #{antiCheatEnabled}, #{maxFocusLossCount}, #{autoSubmitOnFocusLossLimit}, #{allowCopyPaste}, #{maxAttemptCount}, #{allowViewScore}, #{sectionConfigJson}, #{adaptiveRuleJson}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_exam_paper parent_paper_id = #{parentPaperId},paper_name = #{paperName},course_id = #{courseId},paper_type = #{paperType},paper_level = #{paperLevel},answer_mode = #{answerMode},paper_weight = #{paperWeight},sort_no = #{sortNo},total_score = #{totalScore},duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes},publish_status = #{publishStatus},publish_start_time = #{publishStartTime},publish_end_time = #{publishEndTime},strategy_template_id = #{strategyTemplateId},pass_score = #{passScore},marking_mode = #{markingMode},question_order_mode = #{questionOrderMode},question_navigation_mode = #{questionNavigationMode},allow_review_analysis = #{allowReviewAnalysis},anti_cheat_enabled = #{antiCheatEnabled},max_focus_loss_count = #{maxFocusLossCount},auto_submit_on_focus_loss_limit = #{autoSubmitOnFocusLossLimit},allow_copy_paste = #{allowCopyPaste},max_attempt_count = #{maxAttemptCount},allow_view_score = #{allowViewScore},section_config_json = #{sectionConfigJson},adaptive_rule_json = #{adaptiveRuleJson},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where paper_id = #{paperId}
